property.name: fieldPath
property.label: Field API Path
property.description: Full field path to watch, e.g. Opportunity.StageName or Case.Status

property.name: triggerValue
property.label: Trigger Value
property.description: The field value that triggers confetti, e.g. Closed Won or Resolved

property.name: themeName
property.label: Confetti Theme
property.description: Developer name of a Confetti Theme custom metadata record, e.g. Green_Yellow. Manage themes in Setup > Custom Metadata Types > Confetti Theme.
